---
title: "Day 7: Florence to Naples"
subtitle: "High-Speed Train to Southern Italy"
date: "2026-06-11"
day-of-week: "Wednesday"
location: "Florence → Naples"
categories: [itinerary, travel, florence, naples]
---

## Overview

**Travel day:** High-speed train from Florence to Naples (2.5 hours), settling into Naples, first taste of southern Italy

---

## Morning: Florence Checkout & Train (8 AM-12 PM)

### Hotel Checkout

- Final breakfast in Florence
- Check room for forgotten items
- Settle bill (verify charges)
- Get taxi or walk to SMN station

### Firenze SMN to Napoli Centrale

**See:** [Trains Research](../research/trains.qmd#route-2-florence-naples)

**Train Details:**
- Frecciarossa or Italo high-speed
- Duration: 2h 30m - 3h
- Check your booking for exact time
- Arrive station 20 min early

**On Train:**
- Comfortable, modern
- Power outlets at seats
- WiFi (sometimes unreliable)
- Café car available
- Sit on right (west) approaching Naples for Vesuvius views

**Route:** Through Tuscany, Apennines, approaching Campania

---

## Midday: Arrive Naples (12-2 PM)

### Napoli Centrale Station

**Arrival:**
- Busy, chaotic station
- **Watch belongings** - pickpockets target tourists
- Follow "Uscita" (exit) signs
- Emergeinto Piazza Garibaldi

### To Hotel

**Taxi (Recommended):**
- Official white taxis only
- Agree on price or insist on meter (~€15-20 to most hotels)
- Avoid touts offering "taxi"

**Metro (If Adventurous):**
- Line 1 or 2 depending on hotel location
- €1.10 ticket
- Watch bags

### Hotel Check-In

- Ask for restaurant recommendations
- WiFi password
- Safety tips for neighborhood
- Map of area

---

## Afternoon: First Naples Impressions (2-6 PM)

**Settle In:**
- Quick shower, change
- Orient yourself to neighborhood
- Walk around immediate area

**Explore:**
- Find nearby café for espresso
- Walk toward waterfront or centro storico
- Get feel for Naples energy (very different from Florence!)

**First Observations:**
- Louder, more chaotic than Florence
- More scooters, more traffic
- Hanging laundry, narrow streets
- Raw, authentic southern Italy

---

## Evening: First Naples Pizza! (7-10 PM)

**Pizza is Essential Tonight**

**See:** [Restaurants - Naples Pizza](../research/restaurants.qmd#pizza-essential)

**Options:**
- **Da Michele** (cash only, expect line, worth it)
- **Sorbillo** (Via dei Tribunali)
- **50 Kalò** (more upscale, reserve ahead)

**What to Order:**
- Margherita (the original, invented here in 1889)
- Or Marinara (no cheese, just tomato, garlic, oregano)
- Cost: €5-12 depending on place

**After Pizza:**
- Sfogliatella (shell-shaped pastry) for dessert
- Or gelato
- Spaccanapoli evening walk if energetic

---

## Prepare for Tomorrow

**Herculaneum Tour:**
- Check tour confirmation (meeting time/place)
- Wear comfortable shoes
- Bring: water, sun protection, camera
- Set alarm (likely early departure)

---

**Previous:** [Day 6](day-06-2026-06-10-florence.qmd) | **Next:** [Day 8: Naples & Herculaneum](day-08-2026-06-12-naples-herculaneum.qmd)
